url.title: Project URL
url.description: The Kickstarter project URL that was scraped

projectName.title: Project Name
projectName.description: The name/title of the Kickstarter project

category.title: Category
category.description: The project's Kickstarter category (e.g., Technology, Design)

subcategory.title: Subcategory
subcategory.description: The project's Kickstarter subcategory if available

followerCount.title: Follower Count
followerCount.description: Number of people who clicked 'Notify Me' (null if < 10 followers, as Kickstarter hides the count)

backerCount.title: Backer Count
backerCount.description: Number of backers (available for live/completed projects)

scrapedAt.title: Scraped At
scrapedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the data was collected
